title: Korean-Style Teriyaki Stir Fry with Flaxseed
description: A quick and easy Japanese-inspired stir fry made with a sweet and savory Korean-inspired teriyaki sauce, served with crunchy flaxseed for added texture.

ingredients.name: fry
ingredients.notes: tofu, drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, maple syrup, and garlic.
Pour the teriyaki sauce over the vegetables and tofu, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Sprinkle the flaxseed over the top and serve immediately.
Serve over steamed rice or noodles, if desired.
